app.title: DocuFind Local
index.cancel_tooltip: Request cancellation of the current operation
index.clear_tooltip: Clear the saved index without deleting files or settings
index.clear_confirm: Delete the current index? Documents, chunks, FTS, reindex queue, and run history will be cleared. Settings and files on disk will not change.
index.clear_busy: The index cannot be deleted while an operation is running.
index.clear_progress_details: Clearing documents, chunks, FTS, terms, lemmas, errors, queue, and run history.
index.progress_cancelling: Indexing: cancellation requested · waiting for the current operation to stop
index.progress_cancelling_wait: Current file: cancellation will apply after the current step
index.progress_details: New: {new} · Reindexed: {reindexed} · Unchanged: {unchanged} · Skipped: {skipped} · Deleted: {deleted} · Restored: {restored} · Failed: {failed}
results.title: Results
results.context_file_match: The match was found in the file name or path.
results.open_in_explorer_tooltip: Open the folder and select this file
preview.title: Preview
preview.file_only: The match was found in the file name or path: {path}
preview.stale: The fragment comes from the index. The file changed after indexing; reindexing is recommended.
editor.title: Editor
editor.saved_reindex_failed: File saved, but the index was not updated. Reindex and try again.
editor.saved_reindex_cancelled: File saved; reindexing was cancelled. Try again later.
editor.mode.blocked_too_large: The file is too large for the editor
editor.mode.blocked_unsupported: The file format is not supported by the editor
editor.mode.blocked_changed_on_disk: The file changed on disk; reload it before saving
settings.title: Settings
settings.saved_reindex_required: Settings were saved. Reindexing is required for the new indexing rules.
